utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Next, check if each is fully specified with all required details (i.e., includes the relevant coverage and associated costs). 1) health_coverage: Includes physical and mental health for personal and for children with per-child costs. Costs are specified for each. This satisfies 'physical and mental health insurance with costs.' 2) property_coverage: Includes home/contents insurance for personal and per child with costs. Satisfies 'home/contents insurance with costs.' 3) travel_coverage: Includes personal and per-child travel insurance with costs. Satisfies 'travel insurance with costs.' 4) additional_services: Includes an enhancement service with cost. Satisfies 'any enhancement services with costs.' 5) total_budget: Provides monthly breakdown for personal, children, and grand total. Satisfies 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown' at least monthly; annual not explicitly given but monthly is a complete breakdown. Therefore, all 5 items are included and sufficiently specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract the items from the final coverage plan and match them to the ground-truth ratings list. The plan includes: EliteCare Premium Plan for personal physical health (rated under primary_health_coverage.physical_health), EliteCare Premium Plan for personal mental health (rated under primary_health_coverage.mental_health), InsurePlus Standard Plan for child physical and mental health (both rated under their respective sections), EliteHome Premium Coverage for personal home content (property_protection.home_content), CareCo Basic Coverage for child home content (same section), EliteTravel Premium Plan for personal travel insurance (mobility_coverage.travel_insurance), CareCo Basic Plan for child travel insurance (same section), and Premium Insurance Membership under general_services (monthly option corresponds to the same item rating). Map each exact item name to its rating number.
